revision.text:

This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:元寇]].

This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]][[en:1274 in Asia]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]][[en:1274 in Asia]] [[Category:Mongol invasions of Japan]] [[ja:Category:1274年のアジア]] [[ar:Category:آسيا في 1274]] [[az:Category:1274-cü ildə Asiya]] [[bn:Category:১২৭৪-এ এশিয়া]] [[fa:Category:آسیا در ۱۲۷۴ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:1274 Ասիայում]] [[id:Category:Asia dalam tahun 1274]] [[ko:Category:1274년 아시아]] [[tr:Category:1274'te Asya]] [[uk:Category:1274 в Азії]] [[ur:Category:ایشیا میں 1274ء]] [[en:Category:1274 in Asia]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:Category:1274 in Asia]] [[en:Category:1274 in Asia]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
[[Template:Year in continent category]] now needs no parameters, replaced: {{Year in continent category|Asia}} → {{Year in continent category}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q8089605}} (found via Wikipedia API)

<!--categories-->
